title: palma draco
intro: Palma draco, also known as the dragon's blood tree, is a unique tree species native to the island of Socotra in Yemen. It is known for its resinous sap, which has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The resin is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. The sap can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including capsules, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
